name: In Time - RPG
description:
In Time | Bot scenario : Everyone got a counter on their left arm that shows their lifespan. Time is the currency in this world, but you only have four days left, and you just got fired from your job in London.
How will you survive ?

Made to be Male POV Only
Inspired by the movie 'In Time'

----
Hi! I'm Edgeer. English is not my main language, sorry if there are some issues. Give me some reviews so I can improve, thank you ! I can update the bot to make it better overtime depending on what reviews I get back!
Still unsure about all the time system, don't hesitate to give me reviews so I can improve on that matter!
